title: Crows and Ravens
description: A mod that add some bird themed weapons and armor . Will also add the birds in a future update . Works both on singleplayer and multiplayer
body:
A mod that adds some crow themed gear to minecraft . Will add some more stuff in the future like a crow and a ridable giant raven . 

**Curently adds** :
- steel feather made by smithing a echo shard , netherite scraps and feathers 
- Feathered armor made from steel feathers and netherite scraps , when you wear a full set you get speed 2 ( to compensate for being a bit weaker then netherite )
- Feathered Rapier  ( quick weapon faster then a sword , right click to perform a dash launching yourself forword)
- Raven claw glavie ( applys poison for 4 sec on hit or can apply slowness 2  )


LINK TO THE DISCORD IF YOU WANT TO ASK QUESTIONS ABOUT GAMEPLAY OR DEVELOPMENT: https://discord.gg/uxUqV96Zh7

Cover for the mod made by Crusad_3r
